description_long: This object is a shoulder-fired rocket-propelled grenade launcher, specifically resembling the RPG-7, with a cylindrical black metal tube, a wooden handguard, and a prominent conical muzzle at the front. The launcher features a wooden pistol grip and a secondary grip, both attached to the main tube, and a rear flared exhaust port. The front of the launcher is fitted with a large, olive-green, pointed warhead, while a separate, similarly shaped projectile is shown alongside. The warhead has stabilizing fins at the rear, and the launcher includes simple iron sights mounted on top. The materials are a mix of metal, wood, and composite, with the warhead likely containing internal explosives. The overall finish is matte with some glossy highlights on the metal and painted surfaces. This weapon is commonly seen in military or urban conflict scenarios.
description: A shoulder-fired RPG-7 launcher with a wooden grip, black metal tube, and an olive-green conical warhead, accompanied by a separate projectile.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full RPG-7 launcher with attached warhead and visible wooden and metal components.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed warhead tip and the circular exhaust port at the rear, with the separate projectile beside it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the launcher and the separate projectile, with visible stabilizing fins and grip details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flared exhaust port and the back of the warhead, with the separate projectile's tail fins visible.
